refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation, task scheduling, and resource utilization.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level; decomposing it into sub-FRs focused on key productivity drivers (equipment operation, task scheduling, resource utilization) allows targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations; verify that each sub-FR contributes to meeting or exceeding the productivity target.
sub_frs: FR2: Enable effective task scheduling and coordination

candidate_dps: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms for operation efficiency
DP2: Integrated teleoperation and task management system
DP3: Real-time resource monitoring and allocation services
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms for operation efficiency

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and teleoperation modules
Coordination between task scheduling and resource monitoring
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically decoupled from task scheduling and resource monitoring but requires interface with teleoperation for control handover.

assumptions_risks: Assumes teleoperation system can reliably interface with vehicle control algorithms.
Risk that vehicle control complexity may increase coupling if not modularized.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing vehicle control to isolate teleoperation interface and maintain low coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for vehicle operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle control module sends operational data to other modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task commands from teleoperation or scheduling modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Bidirectional communication channel for control commands and status updates.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of vehicle control logic; low diffusion to other modules.
Vehicle control logic partially diffused if teleoperation module duplicates control algorithms.
Minimal relevance to vehicle control logic.
System-level module with mixed containment and diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module should fully contain the vehicle control DP to minimize diffusion and maintain clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential duplication of control logic in Teleoperation module if interfaces are not well defined.
Risk of increased coupling if Network Link interface is not properly managed.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Enforce strict interface boundaries and centralize vehicle control algorithms within Vehicle module.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (advanced vehicle control algorithms) directly addresses the refined FR (optimize equipment operation efficiency) with clear logical mapping.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion of control logic into Teleoperation module if interfaces are not strictly enforced.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows high containment score, indicating good packaging of DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring vehicle operational efficiency and telemetry data within the Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of vehicle control DP to Vehicle IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Strengthen interface definitions between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules to prevent logic duplication.
Review Network Link usage to ensure minimal coupling.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets the criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility. No immediate need to zigzag or revise at this level.
next_level_sub_frs: FR2: Enable effective task scheduling and coordination

revise.why: Current FR, DP, and IM assignments are consistent and well-contained.

assumptions: Teleoperation module will not duplicate vehicle control algorithms.
Network Link interface will be managed to minimize coupling.
open_risks: Potential diffusion of control logic into Teleoperation module.
Complexity of vehicle control algorithms impacting modularity.
evidence_needed: Telemetry data demonstrating vehicle operation efficiency.
Interface compliance reports between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
